config.label: Head scripts
config.placeholder: Inline JS, run inside <head>. Paste the exact Google Tag Manager <script> snippet — the wrapping <script> tags are stripped automatically.

config.label: Body start scripts
config.placeholder: Pasted verbatim right after the opening <body> tag. e.g. the Google Tag Manager <noscript> snippet.

config.label: Body end scripts
config.placeholder: Pasted verbatim right before the closing </body> tag.
